message:
fix(daemon): improve WASI fd handling for interpreter mode

- Use wasm_runtime_set_wasi_args_ex to pass client socket as stdout fd
- Also redirect OS stdout via dup2 for native output paths
- Add empty_env list for request instances (no EDGEBOX_SERVE_MODE)
- Document CoW limitation: pre-compiled WASM modules capture
  post-execution state, so re-calling _start doesn't re-run bytecode

Note: WASM interpreter mode with CoW has a fundamental limitation -
the QuickJS context is captured after bytecode execution, so
subsequent _start calls skip the already-evaluated module.
Use AOT mode for benchmarks.
